data.whoToFind: Recruiter or current Client Analyst, Institutional Client Group
data.message: Hi <name>, I just applied for the Client Analyst role in the Institutional Client Group. I supported 400+ institutional PMs at Bloomberg and would love 15 minutes on what the Client Advisors need most from the seat. Thanks, Neil
data.messageLong: Hi <name>, I applied this week for the Client Analyst opening in the Institutional Client Group. At Bloomberg I was the day to day contact for 400+ institutional portfolio managers (onboarding, account maintenance, reporting data), and at TD Bank I clear 20 to 25 documented cases weekly against a quota of 20. I would value 15 minutes on how the team works with the Client Advisors and what a strong first year looks like. Either way, thanks for reading.
data.cadence: send Tue to Thu morning. If no reply, one polite bump after 5 to 7 days, then stop. Never attach the resume in the first message.
